name: refactor-variable
prompt: In config.ts, rename the variable `x` to `maxRetries` everywhere it appears (declaration, usages in getX, printX, and the template literal). Also rename getX to getMaxRetries and printX to printMaxRetries. Update the exports accordingly.
verify: grep -q 'maxRetries' config.ts && ! grep -q '\bx\b' config.ts && grep -q 'getMaxRetries' config.ts
